Questions or changes, contact: epunch@cascadeoc.org
Thank you to all volunteers for helping make this event a success!
Result status codes: msp = missing punch; dnf = did not finish; nc = not competing; dq = disqualified; ovt = overtime; dns = did not start; <time>* = status not reported.
